en.extract:
The dusky sunbird (Cinnyris fuscus) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. This relatively dull sunbird is found in arid savanna, thickets and shrubland (e.g. Karoo) in Angola, Botswana, Namibia, and South Africa.

External links

Dusky sunbird Structured guide to the species in southern Africa

The '''dusky sunbird''' ('''''Cinnyris fuscus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Nectariniidae]]. This relatively dull [[sunbird]] is found in arid savanna, thickets and [[shrubland]] (e.g. [[Karoo]]) in Angola, Botswana, Namibia, and South Africa.
[[File:Dusky Sunbird Branch 2019-07-26.jpg|left|thumb|Dusky sunbird near Halali in [[:en:Etosha National Park|Etosha National Park]] [[:en:Namibia|Namibia]]]]
